name: Broccoli and Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 oz can cream of mushroom soup
1/2 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cook noodles according to package directions and drain.
3. Lightly prepare the bottom of a 2 1/2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine noodles, chicken, onions, and broccoli.
5. In another mixing bowl, combine soup, milk, cheese, basil, salt, and pepper.
6. Stir in the noodle mixture.
7. Pour the entire mixture into the prepared dish.
8. Bake, covered for 40 minutes.
